posts.author: wafahu (Wafa Hasnaghina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday!

I’d like to request a feature enhancement for Extract File Email within monday.com. Currently, we need a way to extract file attachments from Updates or incoming email and extract relevant text from the updates, such as email addresses and other key details.
